description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wallet with a rugged, utilitarian design, primarily in shades of olive and tan. The exterior appears to be made of durable fabric, possibly canvas or nylon, with visible stitching and some areas showing faint stains and discoloration. The front side features a flap closure and several horizontal stitched sections, one of which is marked by a red stain or paint. The back side has two prominent fabric loops with white plastic or metal D-rings, likely for attachment to a belt or bag. The wallet's surface is matte and slightly textured, suggesting a semi-soft, grippy feel. There are no visible brand logos, but the wallet shows signs of use, including minor stains and a red mark.
description: A rugged, olive-tan wallet with a flap closure, stitched sections, and attachment loops, showing minor stains and a red mark.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wallet's vertical stitching and slightly rounded, soft structure.
description_view_1: Back view displaying two fabric loops with white D-rings for attachment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible stitching and a smoother, less detailed surface.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the flap closure, horizontal stitched sections, and a prominent red stain.
attribute_visible_wear_or_damage: minor stains and a red mark on the front flap
attribute_attachment_or_chain: Two fabric loops with white D-rings on the back for attachment
